title: Ruko Q150 Amphibious Remote Control Cars, IPX6 Waterproof Transform Vehicle Toys, 4WD Off-Road RC Stunt Car with 360°Rotating for All Terrain, Remote Control Car for Kids, for Boy Toys
features: 【Cool RC Stunt Car】Innovative bionic joint design allows the remote control car to change shape with a key twist, flip 180° and rotate 360°. Create special effects for kids to explore and enjoy.

【Amphibious RC Car】1:16 scale Q150 remote control car benefits from lPX6 waterproof and waterproof rubber rings, allowing it to not only drive on the road, but also surf the water like a boat. Let your kids play without limitations. The remote control is not waterproof.

【Extra Long Playtime】An extra battery is included in the package so you can enjoy up to 40 minutes of driving (20 minutes each). The Q150 rc car's battery is rechargeable for fast charging and long battery life.
【Propeller Wheels】Unique propeller-type wheel and high-quality silicone anti-skid belt combined to give amphibious remote control vehicle strong road grip, a variety of venues more than enough edge.

【Anti-Interference Tech】2.4GHz allows only one toy car to be connected to each remote control, allowing multiple toy cars to compete at the same time and place without interfering with each other. Note: The Q150 amphibious remote control car can go in a straight normally at a distance of 9.8-16 inches, but if the distance is too long, the car may deviate.
【Conquer All Terrain】Powerful double motors and four-wheel drive and you can maneuver this transformer off-road remote control cars through gravel, grass, mud, and sand for adventure.

【High Quality Material】Made of high-strength explosion-proof ABS plastic. The Q150 remote control cars for kids' body is made of precision, strong and durable, not easy to break or fall off, with super anti-collision ability, can effectively prevent wear and vibration.
